markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 51. Tex. Coastal Waterway Act
##### § 51.008 — School Land Board Power

This chapter does not diminish the duty or power of the School Land Board to manage the coastal public land of the state.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter does not diminish the duty or power of the School Land Board to manage the coastal public land of the state.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
